# ConfigurAI

> Applied AI training, audits, and community for professionals and business owners in the UK. Built around how the work actually gets done.

ConfigurAI is a UK-based AI training and consultancy founded by Orgesa Meli, with 17 years in corporate finance and three businesses run alongside ConfigurAI. The company helps senior professionals and business owners apply AI to real work through cohort programmes, personalised audits, and an ongoing community.

## Products

- [AI Cohort - Professionals](https://configurai.com/professionals.html): A six-week executive cohort for employed professionals, applying AI to their actual role. Includes weekly live calls, six self-paced modules, and a pre-cohort AI Audit. £297.
- [AI Cohort - Business Owners](https://configurai.com/business-owners.html): A six-week cohort for business owners building AI systems into operations and growth. £297.
- [AI Audit - Professionals](https://configurai.com/professionals-audit.html): A one-to-one diagnostic for senior professionals, delivered as a 30 to 45 minute Zoom interview, a 7 to 9 page personalised report, and a 30 minute follow-up debrief. £295.
- [AI Audit - Business Owners](https://configurai.com/business-owners-audit.html): The same diagnostic format adapted for business owners, focused on revenue recovered, operational efficiency, and team leverage. £295.
- [AI Workflow Insiders Community](https://www.skool.com/ai-workflow-insiders-2123/about): Practical AI community with weekly workflow rebuilds, Monday prompts, and tool walkthroughs. $29 per month.
- [Corporate Training](https://configurai.com/corporate.html): Custom AI training programmes for finance teams and general corporate teams, delivered across three tiers (Spotlight, Workshop, Sprint).

## About the Founder

Orgesa Meli is the founder of ConfigurAI. Seventeen years in corporate finance. Three businesses. Based in London. Built ConfigurAI after extensively testing every AI tool, workflow, and prompting technique to find what actually delivers results. Uses AI daily to run three businesses while picking her children up from school at half three.

## Key Pages

- [About](https://configurai.com/about.html): Full background on Orgesa Meli and ConfigurAI's approach.
- [Community](https://configurai.com/community.html): The AI Workflow Insiders community page.
- Contact: Email support@configurai.com or WhatsApp +44 7414 962803.

## Important Notes

- ConfigurAI focuses on two AI tools: ChatGPT and Claude. These are the primary tools taught and used across all programmes.
- All training emphasises practical application over theory.
- The Executive Certification in AI Leadership, Automation and Transformation is awarded upon completion of any cohort.
- Cohorts are capped at 15 participants for personalised attention.
- ConfigurAI is based in London, United Kingdom.
